headline: Assessing ConocoPhillips (COP) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Month Share Price Run
summary: Why ConocoPhillips (COP) has been catching investor attention ConocoPhillips (COP) shares have been in focus after a strong stretch, with returns of about 11% over the past month and 25% in the past 3 months. This performance has prompted investors to reassess the stock’s appeal. See our latest analysis for ConocoPhillips. At a share price of US$116.82, ConocoPhillips has seen firm momentum, with a 5.5% 7 day share price return, an 11.4% 30 day share price return and a 20.8% year to date...
